3047230.name: The Untamed realms
3047230.description:
Untamed Realms is a Multiplayer Creature Collection Game. Capture new creatures and battle your friends! 
Discover a brand-new world filled with amazing creatures and set out to find the strongest. Test your skills in battle against other players with our battling system, designed to be easy to learn, yet hard to master. Train your creatures by levelling them up and select the moves you think work best for your playstyle. 

Main Features in Untamed Realms:

  • Take Control of your Creatures

  • Battle other players or other creatures in our combat gameplay! Put your skills to the test and aim to be the greatest!

  • Capture and Level a variety of unique Creatures

  • Build your collection and customize their move sets to give you the exact creature you want to use. Tailor each one to your playstyle and level them up on your way to the very top!

  • Exploring a vast Open World

  • Traverse the in-game world either alone or with your friends! Meet up in various towns or take each other on inside the Stadium! Find new and exciting creatures in the different biomes and discover hidden secrets.

  • Multiplayer - The game features many social features such as Proximity Voice Chat and Trading in order to enhance the multiplayer experience.
